# Cyber Hat

> Cyber Hat is a privately held group with a long-term interest in security. We
> bring together experienced people and a patient outlook, and we work quietly.
> We prefer to let the work speak for itself.

## Pages
- [Home](https://cyberh.at/): Overview of Cyber Hat's approach, focus areas, and contact details.

## Contact
- General: hello@cyberh.at
- Security disclosures: security@cyberh.at
